---
title: "Verhaal van de Wadden"
author: "Rijkswaterstaat / Deltares"
date: "2022-11-29"
output:
  slidy_presentation: default
  # ioslides_presentation: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, out.width="90%")

# invoke with
# rmarkdown::render(file.path("verhaalVanDeWadden", "verhaal.Rmd"), rmarkdown::slidy_presentation())

```

#

```{r pressure}
knitr::include_graphics(knitr::include_graphics("Het-verhaal-van-de-wadden-v1/Slide1.png"))
```

#

```{r pressure2}
knitr::include_graphics(knitr::include_graphics("Het-verhaal-van-de-wadden-v1/Slide2.png"))
```

#

```{r pressure3}
knitr::include_graphics(knitr::include_graphics("Het-verhaal-van-de-wadden-v1/Slide3.png"))
```

#

```{r pressure4}
knitr::include_graphics(knitr::include_graphics("Het-verhaal-van-de-wadden-v1/Slide4.png"))
```

#

```{r pressure5}
knitr::include_graphics(knitr::include_graphics("Het-verhaal-van-de-wadden-v1/Slide5.png"))
```

#

```{r pressure6}
knitr::include_graphics(knitr::include_graphics("Het-verhaal-van-de-wadden-v1/Slide6.png"))
```

#

```{r pressure7 }
knitr::include_graphics(knitr::include_graphics("Het-verhaal-van-de-wadden-v1/Slide7.png"))
```

# 

[Terug naar Systeemrapportage Wadden](https://www.systeemrapportage.nl/wadden/)
